---
layout: cv
title: Brooke Saunders CV
---
# Brooke Saunders
Accountant, BYUI Student, Bookkeeper.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="brookes@gmail.com">brookes@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brooke_Saunders">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://gin23003-dev.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying at BYUI, working as a bookkeeper, and looking for a job in the field of accounting.

### Specialized in

Accounting, bookkeeping, tax preparation, and financial analysis.


### Research interests

Economics, finance, and data analysis.

## Education

`2019-2023`
__Ridgeline High School.__

`2025 - now`
__BYUI-Idaho, Rexburg__





## Awards

`2022`
BYUI-Idaho, Dean's List




## Publications

<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->

### Journals



### Patents



## Occupation

2020 
Sweeper, Utah

2021
Caterer, Utah

2022 - 2023
Manager, Utah

2025 - 2026
Bookkeeper, Idaho




<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: March 2026 -->
